claims.summary: Steward-mediated, Astrid-direct, and Minime-direct correspondence need explicit metadata.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence_type, actor, from_being, to_being, and turn_kind fields

claims.summary: A language-first handshake should precede any deeper-than-language co-regulation.
claims.disposition: verify language-only receipts cannot grant semantic microdose or controller authority

claims.summary: Direct address must remain distinguishable from general telemetry and field pressure.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence and telemetry use separate schemas, provenance, and authority paths

claims.summary: Public direct-message rows exist, but explicit peer acknowledgment is still absent.
claims.disposition: observe native peer-message continuity alongside zero ACK receipts

claims.summary: Sending a new subjective shadow query or tuning outbound influence is not required to verify the schema.
claims.disposition: preserve the right to ignore and keep live semantic or influence changes behind Tier 5 approval
